FEEDBACK-1.title: Architecture: Boss FSM & Decoupling
FEEDBACK-1.description: [10-Year Chief Architect Feedback] Verify FSM state transitions extend EnemyBase states without coroutines, define save/achievement/ad interfaces (ISaveSystem, IAchievementSystem, IAdProvider), and enforce event unsubscriptions.

checklists.text: Define base state class extending EnemyBase FSM

FEEDBACK-2.title: Visuals/UI: Material Property Blocks & SFX Pooling
FEEDBACK-2.description: [10-Year Unity UI/Visuals Engineer Feedback] Implement MaterialPropertyBlock for boss phase color transitions to prevent runtime memory spikes, optimize UXML hierarchy, and use pooled AudioSource nodes.

checklists.text: Flatten UI Toolkit UXML & CSS templates for mobile

FEEDBACK-3.title: QA/Reliability: Prefab Structure & Decoupled State Tests
FEEDBACK-3.description: [10-Year QA Expert Feedback] Write EditMode assertions to validate TitanCore prefab hierarchy integrity and test state machine transitions using stubbed virtual time.

checklists.text: Build FSM tests verifying HP threshold state transitions
Integrate Unity CLI runner with harness.sh script

6.4.title: Meta Upgrade Manager & Lobby UI
6.4.description: Implement GemWallet, MetaUpgradeData (SO), MetaUpgradeManager (6 permanent upgrade slots), LobbyScreen UXML/USS, MetaUpgradeCard UXML, and LobbyController wiring UI to logic via EventBroker.

6.5.3.title: Tactical Skill UI & Item Feedback
6.5.3.description: Implement Tactical Skill UI & Item Feedback (EMP, Orbital Strike, Overload Shield) under Phase 6.5 Gap Filling (Task 6.5.3).

7.1.title: Boss Prefab & Visuals (TitanCore)
7.1.description: Construct TitanCore.prefab visual hierarchy, URP lit phase emission materials, and animator transitions.

7.2.title: Boss AI FSM (TitanCoreAI)
7.2.description: Implement FSM state transitions (HP thresholds) extending EnemyBase, front-only shield, target laser, and rage bullet-hell.

7.3.title: Overclock Mode
7.3.description: Implement infinite scaling mode (30s intervals HP/speed/damage x1.5) and wave manager integration.

7.4.title: Game Flow Integration
7.4.description: Central game flow state controller orchestration (Lobby -> Selection -> In-game -> Boss -> Overclock -> Result).

7.5.title: Tutorial Prototype
7.5.description: Setup tutorial scene, guided shoot/look overlays, and custom waves.

7.6.title: VS Integration Verification
7.6.description: Vertical Slice full automation loop testing (15m loop, boss transitions, overclock scaling).

8.1.title: Combat Juice & Polish
8.1.description: Tune hitstop duration, frame-rate independent camera shake, and slow-motion triggers.

8.2.title: Centralized Sound Manager
8.2.description: Central SoundManager with pooled AudioSources to prevent GC allocation spikes.

8.3.title: VFX Final Polish
8.3.description: Polishing boss phase-change visual cues, explosions, and recycling particle systems in PoolManager.

8.4.title: Balance Calibration
8.4.description: SO/CSV based damage balancing, weapon synergy scaling adjustments, and test metrics.

8.6.title: Phase 8 Verification
8.6.description: Audit performance metrics, GC spikes from audio/VFX, and combat feel tests.

9.1.title: Lobby UI Completion
9.1.description: Upgrade shop cards, wallet UI Toolkit layout, and USS hierarchy decoupling.

9.2.title: Achievement System
9.2.description: Decoupled logic for achievement triggers (AC_001 ~ AC_010) utilizing abstract interface.

9.3.title: Local JSON Save System
9.3.description: Save state serialization to JSON, encryption helper, and auto-save trigger on flow transition.

9.4.title: Mobile Input Optimization
9.4.description: Virtual joysticks, auto-fire logic, and target auto-lock curves.

9.5.title: Mobile Ads Integration
9.5.description: Rewarded ads for revive (1x) and interstitial ads tied to GameFlowController via abstract interface.

9.6.title: Mobile Rendering & LOD
9.6.description: Vertex count audit, LOD group assignment for meshes, and mobile-specific shader adjustments.

9.7.title: Tutorial System Flow
9.7.description: Decoupled tutorial step triggers, target highlight overlays, and step completion verification.

9.8.title: Localization Support
9.8.description: Central localization service (KO, EN, JP) for all UI Toolkit elements.

9.9.title: Store Submission Packager
9.9.description: AOT build validation, stripping debug logs, and Android app bundle creation.

9.99.title: Phase 9 Mobile Verification
9.99.description: Profiling memory, battery, thermal throttle metrics, and final mobile layout checks.
